title: Flow Formula Type Rules
description: Rules for TEXT() function usage and field type handling in Flow formulas

never_wrap.description: Field types that should NEVER be wrapped in TEXT()
never_wrap.reason: These fields are already Text type - TEXT() is redundant and causes errors

id_fields.error: Incorrect parameter type for function TEXT()

lookup_fields.error: Lookup/Master-Detail fields are already Text type

string_fields.error: String fields don't need TEXT() wrapper

always_wrap.description: Field types that SHOULD be wrapped in TEXT() for string operations
always_wrap.reason: These non-text types need conversion for string comparisons

picklist_fields.error: ISBLANK or direct comparison on picklist without TEXT()

number_fields.notes: Use TEXT() only for string comparisons, not numeric

conditional_wrap.description: Field types where TEXT() depends on usage

formula_fields.rule: If formula returns Text, don't wrap. If returns Number/Date, wrap for string ops.

calculated_fields.rule: Follow same rules as base field type

id_fields.notes: Must query describe to confirm - some custom fields end in Id

custom_fields.notes: Custom fields can be any type - must query describe

text_on_id_field.message: TEXT() wrapper on ID field is redundant

text_on_string_field.message: TEXT() may be redundant on string field
text_on_string_field.auto_fix: Check field type, remove if Text

no_text_on_picklist.message: Picklist comparison without TEXT() will fail

remove_text_from_id.description: Remove TEXT() wrapper from ID/reference fields
conditions: Field type is id, reference, or string
remove_text_from_id.validation: Query describe to confirm field type

add_text_to_picklist.description: Add TEXT() wrapper to picklist fields in comparisons
conditions: Field type is picklist or multipicklist
add_text_to_picklist.validation: Query describe to confirm picklist type
